description:
All the Pokémon data you'll ever need in one place, easily accessible through a modern free open-source RESTful API.

## What is this?

This is a full RESTful API linked to an extensive database detailing everything about the Pokémon main game series.

We've covered everything from Pokémon to Berry Flavors.

## Where do I start?

We have awesome [documentation](https://pokeapi.co/docs/v2) on how to use this API. It takes minutes to get started.

This API will always be publicly available and will never require any extensive setup process to consume.

Created by [**Paul Hallett**](https://github.com/phalt) and other [**PokéAPI contributors**](https://github.com/PokeAPI/pokeapi#contributing) around the world. Pokémon and Pokémon character names are trademarks of Nintendo.

tools.name: ability_list
tools.description: Abilities provide passive effects for Pokémon in battle or in the overworld. Pokémon have multiple possible abilities but can have only one ability at a time. Check out [Bulbapedia](http://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Ability) for greater detail. Optional: limit, offset, q. Returns the PaginatedAbilitySummaryList.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

params.name: q
params.description:
> Only available locally and not at [pokeapi.co](https://pokeapi.co/docs/v2)
Case-insensitive query applied on the `name` property.

tools.name: ability_retrieve
tools.description: Abilities provide passive effects for Pokémon in battle or in the overworld. Pokémon have multiple possible abilities but can have only one ability at a time. Check out [Bulbapedia](http://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Ability) for greater detail. Required: id. Returns the AbilityDetail.

params.name: id
params.description: This parameter can be a string or an integer.

tools.name: characteristic_list

Check out [Bulbapedia](http://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Characteristic) for greater detail. Optional: limit, offset, q. Returns the PaginatedCharacteristicSummaryList.

tools.name: meta_list
tools.description: Returns metadata about the current deployed version of the API, including the git commit hash, deploy date, and tag (if any).

Returns the PaginatedMoveSummaryList.

tools.name: pokemon_list
tools.description: Pokémon are the creatures that inhabit the world of the Pokémon games. They can be caught using Pokéballs and trained by battling with other Pokémon. Each Pokémon belongs to a specific species but may take on a variant which makes it differ from other Pokémon of the same species, such as base stats, available abilities and typings. See [Bulbapedia](http://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_(species)) for greater detail. Optional: limit, offset, q. Returns the PaginatedPokemonSummaryList.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: The initial index from which to return the results.
